overall.description: First-person shooter game footage showing exploration of an industrial shipyard facility. The player moves from an indoor engineering office with technical schematics through outdoor areas with massive cranes and ship construction, briefly passing through a control cabin before navigating corridors beneath a massive ship hull.

agents.ego_description: moving through the engineering office examining wall-mounted technical diagrams and office equipment

entered.detail: Large wall-mounted technical schematic showing mechanical engine components with annotations and sticky notes
Wall-mounted green first aid box with white cross symbol
Row of industrial control boxes and electrical switches mounted on wall
Green metal storage lockers with mesh ventilation doors
Mobile whiteboard with detailed mechanical engineering drawings
Large white industrial gas tank near lockers
Office desk with dual monitors displaying red waveform graphics
Window showing outdoor industrial shipyard area

segments.scene_description: The player explores an indoor engineering office space with technical diagrams covering the walls. The room contains metal lockers, a whiteboard with schematics, office desks with monitors, and industrial equipment. The lighting is artificial and the space is enclosed with no visible windows initially, then passing a window showing the exterior shipyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial shipyard with heavy machinery

events.description: exits indoor office through doorway into bright outdoor shipyard
approaches small control booth structure while navigating around equipment

agents.ego_description: walking through the open shipyard past large orange cranes and shipping containers toward the ship construction area

entered.detail: Massive orange industrial crane with mechanical arm and base structure
White shipping container mounted on red multi-wheeled trailer
Massive red and gray ship hull under construction in dry dock with scaffolding
Small orange and gray control cabin with open doorway

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a bright, open industrial shipyard under clear skies. Massive orange cranes dominate the right side while shipping containers and the hull of a ship under construction fill the background. The player moves across concrete ground toward a small control booth structure, passing heavy machinery and industrial equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow control cabin with monitoring equipment

events.description: enters small control booth structure from the shipyard
exits control booth back to outdoor shipyard area

agents.ego_description: passing through the narrow control cabin interior from entrance to exit

entered.detail: Wall-mounted monitors displaying system status and schematics
Brown metal filing cabinets with multiple drawers
Yellow triangular caution sign on cabin wall

segments.scene_description: The player briefly enters a narrow control cabin with monitoring screens and filing cabinets, passing through the enclosed space from one side to the other. The lighting shifts to artificial as the player moves through the small structure before exiting back to the outdoor shipyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship construction corridor beneath massive hull

events.description: welding sparks become visible falling from work being done on the ship hull overhead

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow corridors between yellow support structures beneath the massive ship hull

entered.detail: Large yellow structural steel supports holding the ship hull
Stacked green equipment crates and storage boxes
Falling sparks and embers from welding work on the ship hull above
Large circular opening or hatch in the side of the ship hull

segments.scene_description: The player moves through a semi-covered corridor beneath the massive red ship hull, passing yellow support beams and green equipment crates. Welding sparks fall from overhead work on the ship. The environment is industrial with concrete ground and the massive scale of the ship construction dominating the view, ending at a large circular opening in the hull.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined engineering office into the sprawling scale of an active industrial shipyard. It begins within an enclosed workspace filled with technical diagrams, lockers, and monitors, moving past a window that reveals the bright exterior. As the camera exits, the scene opens into a sunlit shipyard dominated by massive orange cranes and shipping containers, gliding across concrete ground toward a small control booth. The view briefly shifts back to artificial light while passing through the narrow cabin's monitoring screens before emerging once more into the open air. Finally, the camera moves beneath the towering red hull of a ship, passing yellow support beams and falling welding sparks before arriving at a large circular opening in the vessel's side.
